M-047.NAME: mtproto-admin-ops
M-047.path: backend/app/admin frontend-admin scripts/phase33-mtproto-admin-smoke.mjs scripts/phase41-kpproton-faketls-smoke.mjs scripts/phase43-mtproto-admin-analytics-smoke.mjs scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-33.xml docs/plans/Phase-41.xml docs/plans/Phase-43.xml docs/plans/Phase-54.xml
M-047.owns: Admin inspection and controlled operations for MTProto assignments, runtime bridge health, reissue, revoke, and audit-safe diagnostics.
M-047.purpose: Give the operator visibility and controlled recovery actions for user MTProto proxy assignments without exposing secrets broadly.

exports.api-admin-list-mtproto: List assignments by user, SNI, status, and timestamps with redacted sensitive fields.
exports.api-admin-reissue-mtproto: Force explicit reissue after secret rotation or runtime repair.
exports.api-admin-revoke-mtproto: Disable one user's MTProto assignment and remove its runtime SNI policy without disabling VPN account access.
exports.api-admin-alert-actions: Phase-43 acknowledge, resolve, disable-proxy, and TTL IP block actions from MTProto abuse alerts.
exports.view-admin-mtproto: Admin UI surface for health, assignment search, reissue, revoke, and recent failures.

admin-policy.policy-1: Admin list views show redacted or derived-safe assignment fields by default.
admin-policy.policy-2: Reissue and revoke are explicit audited actions with confirmation in the frontend.
admin-policy.policy-3: MTProto revoke does not implicitly cancel KrotPN subscription or VPN device access.
admin-policy.policy-4: Phase-43 alert actions require explicit confirmation, audit, and safe evidence from M-060/M-061 before enforcement.

constraints.constraint-1: Audit events must not store full tg://proxy links, verification tokens, or raw secrets.
constraints.constraint-2: Admin mobile UX must preserve confirmation-safe destructive actions.
constraints.constraint-3: Phase-41 admin operations must treat official dd credential-mode assignments as superseded/reissue-required and must not expose owner-only KPprotoN ee links or derived secrets.
constraints.constraint-4: Phase-43 IP block actions are TTL-bound and must never store decrypted raw IP strings in audit details.

phase-41-verification-design.check-1: Admin list/detail show credential mode and superseded official state with safe identifiers only.
phase-41-verification-design.check-2: Admin reissue changes exactly one assignment back to KPprotoN fake-TLS SNI policy without returning owner credentials.
phase-41-verification-design.check-3: Admin revoke removes one KPprotoN SNI policy through M-044 and does not call official manifest sync as the production path.
phase-41-verification-design.check-4: Admin UI/smoke output contains no tg links, ee secrets, dd secrets, base secret, salt, runtime token, or private key material.

completion.item-1: Backend admin endpoints expose redacted list/detail/runtime health and explicit reissue/revoke operations under /api/v1/admin/mtproto.
completion.item-2: Reissue and revoke require confirmation, write safe audit events, remove runtime policy state on revoke, and do not return owner-only proxy links or derived secrets.
completion.item-3: Frontend-admin includes a compact /mtproto page with search, status filter, runtime health, and confirmation-safe actions.
completion.item-4: Local Phase-33 backend tests, frontend-admin build, static smoke, XML parse, and MyGRACE lint passed on 2026-05-14.
completion.item-5: Phase-34 static smoke keeps admin MTProto pages free of owner-only tg links, derived secrets, and console secret traces.
completion.item-6: Phase-41 local execution restores admin reissue/revoke to KPprotoN runtime policy behavior and keeps superseded official state redacted.
completion.item-7: Phase-41 backend admin tests passed for KPprotoN bridge health, single-assignment reissue/revoke, audit-safe payloads, and no official manifest sync calls in the production path.
completion.item-8: Phase-43 local execution adds alert acknowledge/resolve, confirmation-safe proxy disable, and TTL IP-block record actions with audit-safe details and no decrypted raw IP strings in audit payloads.

phase-54-verification-design.surface-1: Matrix admin redesign must keep /mtproto assignment inventory, runtime health, search/filter, paging, reissue, revoke, and confirmation surfaces visible and compact.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-2: Admin DOM/smoke output must remain free of owner proxy links, ee/dd secrets, base secret, salt, runtime tokens, and private key material.
phase-54-verification-design.surface-3: No backend MTProto admin endpoint, audit schema, runtime policy, or provisioning behavior changes are included in Phase-54.

phase-54-execution.surface-1: /mtproto now carries compact Matrix assignment inventory, runtime bridge surface, bounded list, and explicit Phase-54 redaction/confirmation markers.
phase-54-execution.surface-2: Reissue/revoke code paths, admin API endpoints, audit schemas, and runtime policy behavior were not changed.

M-047.hotspot: H-033: Admin MTProto operations must never expose full secrets or proxy links in logs, tables, or audit payloads
